seoTitle: Matraville vs Maules Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Matraville and Maules Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Matraville vs Maules Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Matraville and Maules Creek.
heading: Matraville vs Maules Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Matraville, New South Wales and Maules Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Maules Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Matraville (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Matraville or Maules Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Matraville has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Maules Creek scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Matraville scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Maules Creek scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Matraville or Maules Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Maules Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
